sourcesContent:
import React from 'react';
import { Link } from 'react-router-dom';
import './welcome.css';
const Welcome = () => (React.createElement("div", { className: "section-body welcome" },
    React.createElement("h1", { className: "h2" }, "Welcome to Colouring Bahrain!"),
    React.createElement("p", null, "Colouring Bahrain is a free knowledge exchange platform designed to provide over fifty types of open data on Bahrain buildings, to help make the city more sustainable."),
    React.createElement("p", null, "Colouring Bahrain is also the prototype for the Colouring Cities Research programme based at the Alan Turing Institute (the UK's national Institute for data science and artificial intelligence). This project is funded and directed by the Bahrain Authority for Culture and Antiquities. The programme works with local, regional, national and international partners to develop open platform code also of relevance to other cities."),
    React.createElement("p", null, "New datasets and features are added all the time. Any help you can give, colouring-in our building maps, and enriching and verifying our open datasets is very much appreciated."),
    React.createElement("p", null,
        "All our ",
        React.createElement(Link, { to: "/data-extracts.html" }, "data"),
        " and ",
        React.createElement("a", { href: "https://github.com/colouring-bahrain/colouring-bahrain" }, "code"),
        " are free to download, use and share under our open licence terms."),
    React.createElement(Link, { to: "/view/categories", className: "btn btn-outline-dark btn-lg btn-block" }, "Start Colouring Here!"),
    React.createElement("div", { className: "image-row" },
        React.createElement("img", { className: "cl-logo", src: "images/logo-cc.jpg", alt: "Colouring Cities Research Programme" }),
        React.createElement("img", { className: "turing-logo", src: "images/logo-turing.jpg", alt: "Alan Turing Institute (project funded and directed by the Bahrain Authority for Culture and Antiquities)" })),
    React.createElement("div", { className: "image-row" },
        React.createElement("img", { src: "images/supporter-logos.png", alt: "Colouring Bahrain collaborating organisations: BIG IT Technology, University of Bahrain, Bahrain Authority for Culture and Antiquities" }))));
export default Welcome;
